# Vendored: pipe-component-data

Snapshot of https://github.com/reallaksh19/PipeComponentData
(`PipeComponentData-main.zip` archived in reallaksh19/3D_Viewer at commit `1a33ec0`),
with `fromUxmlXml-plain-attr-header.patch` applied.

- Integrity: `VENDOR-MANIFEST.json` (sha256 per file + treeSha256), verified by
  `scripts/pcd-vendor-check.mjs` (`npm run check:pcd`).
- **Vendored files are read-only downstream.** Bug fixes go to the upstream repo;
  then re-vendor and refresh the manifest. Never edit `src/**` here.
- Consumed by `src/core/engineering-data/pipeDataComponentSource.js` and
  `src/core/component-data/pipeDataComponentDimensions.js` behind
  `engineeringDefaults.pipeDataSource === 'pipe-component-data'` (default OFF).
